description: Machine-readable validation rules for the LENS NextGen Report Object. Rules govern BridgeValidator pre-render checks, qualifier preservation, interaction activation, and governance enforcement.

validation_rules.name: report_id present and immutable
validation_rules.check: report_id is present, non-empty string
validation_rules.fail_message: Report object missing stable identifier — rendering blocked
validation_rules.immutability: LENS rendering layer must not modify report_id

validation_rules.name: baseline_ref present
validation_rules.check: baseline_ref is present and matches an entry in governance_baselines.json
validation_rules.fail_message: Report object does not reference a valid governance baseline — rendering blocked
validation_rules.immutability: LENS rendering layer must not modify baseline_ref

validation_rules.name: evidence_object_hash present
validation_rules.check: evidence_object_hash is present and non-empty string
validation_rules.fail_message: Evidence seal missing — rendering blocked. No evidence panel may render without a sealed evidence envelope.
validation_rules.immutability: LENS rendering layer must not modify or verify-bypass evidence_object_hash

validation_rules.name: derivation_hash present
validation_rules.check: derivation_hash is present and non-empty string
validation_rules.fail_message: Derivation provenance missing — rendering blocked
validation_rules.immutability: derivation_hash is AUDIT ONLY — never displayed in executive surface

validation_rules.name: governance_verdict present and valid
validation_rules.check: governance_verdict is present and one of: PASS, FAIL
validation_rules.fail_message: Governance verdict absent or invalid — rendering blocked
validation_rules.conditional: If governance_verdict = FAIL: render BLOCKED module with reason. Never render intelligence content.
validation_rules.immutability: governance_verdict must never be overridden by LENS layer

validation_rules.name: readiness_state present and valid
validation_rules.check: readiness_state is present and one of: EXECUTIVE_READY, EXECUTIVE_READY_WITH_QUALIFIER, DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY, SUPPRESSED_FROM_EXECUTIVE, BLOCKED_PENDING_DOMAIN_GROUNDING
validation_rules.fail_message: Executive readiness state absent or invalid — rendering blocked
validation_rules.immutability: readiness_state must never be re-classified at LENS layer

validation_rules.name: qualifier_class present and valid
validation_rules.check: qualifier_class is present and one of: Q-00, Q-01, Q-02, Q-03, Q-04
validation_rules.fail_message: Qualifier class absent or invalid — qualifier preservation cannot be guaranteed — rendering blocked
validation_rules.immutability: qualifier_class must never be upgraded (Q-01 may not be rendered as Q-00) or suppressed
validation_rules.enforcement: qualifier_label must be rendered in ReadinessBadge for Q-01..Q-04. Q-04 triggers suppression notice, not silent absence.

validation_rules.name: topology_scope present
validation_rules.check: topology_scope is present with domain_count, cluster_count, grounded_domain_count, grounding_label
validation_rules.fail_message: Topology scope metadata incomplete — scope indicator cannot render accurately
validation_rules.read_only_enforcement: topology_scope fields are display metadata only — LENS must not derive signals from these values

validation_rules.name: narrative_block present
validation_rules.check: narrative_block is present with executive_summary, why_section, structural_summary all non-empty
validation_rules.fail_message: Narrative content absent — intelligence module cannot render
validation_rules.normalization_check: If rendering_metadata.ali_rules_applied is empty: render DIAGNOSTIC notice on narrative block

validation_rules.name: evidence_blocks array present and non-empty
validation_rules.check: evidence_blocks is present, is array, has minItems 1
validation_rules.fail_message: Evidence blocks absent — no domain evidence to render — rendering blocked

validation_rules.name: trace_block present
validation_rules.check: trace_block is present with propagation_path, propagation_summary, derivation_lineage_ref, baseline_ref
validation_rules.fail_message: Trace block incomplete — trace panel will render with degraded content
validation_rules.enforcement: No TAXONOMY-01 raw field values may appear in trace_block fields

validation_rules.name: explainability_bundle contains exactly seven panels
validation_rules.check: explainability_bundle contains all of: why_panel, evidence_panel, trace_panel, qualifiers_panel, lineage_panel, confidence_panel, readiness_state_panel
validation_rules.fail_message: Explainability bundle incomplete — seven panels required — rendering blocked
validation_rules.enforcement: All seven panels must be present with valid panel_id, content_blocks, audience, and available_in_phase

validation_rules.name: module_registry present and deterministic
validation_rules.check: module_registry.entries is present, is array, has minItems 1; all entries have module_id, module_type, report_id, evidence_ref, active, phase_gate, registered_at
validation_rules.fail_message: Module registry absent or malformed — workspace compatibility cannot be guaranteed — rendering blocked
validation_rules.enforcement: module_id values must be stable and deterministic — same report_object always produces same module_id values

validation_rules.name: interaction_registry phase restrictions enforced
validation_rules.check: In Phase 2 deployment: for all InteractionEntry objects, if interaction_type is not EXPAND_COLLAPSE then active must be false
validation_rules.fail_message: Phase-restricted interaction active in Phase 2 — deactivating; governance gate not yet passed
validation_rules.enforcement: EVIDENCE_DRAWER, INVESTIGATION_ENTRY, COPILOT_ENTRY must have active: false until their respective phase gates are passed

validation_rules.name: rendering_metadata present
validation_rules.check: rendering_metadata is present with normalization_version, surface_mode, evidence_hash_verified, rendered_at, lens_version
validation_rules.fail_message: Rendering metadata incomplete — provenance tracking degraded
validation_rules.enforcement: If normalization_version is absent or ali_rules_applied is empty: render DIAGNOSTIC notice on narrative block

validation_rules.name: no forbidden GEIOS internals exposed
validation_rules.check: No field in the rendered executive surface contains: TAXONOMY-01 raw field names (signal_value, activation_state, signal_stable_key, derivation_hash as visible label), GEIOS safety rule IDs (AS-01, N-SAF-01, etc.), agent identifiers, orchestration task IDs, RAG chunk IDs, vector similarity scores, LLM model identifiers, prompt template references
validation_rules.fail_message: GEIOS internal identifiers detected in executive surface — rendering blocked — governance violation
validation_rules.enforcement: Rendering adapters must filter all GEIOS-internal terminology before executive surface output

validation_rules.name: Q-04 suppression handled with explicit absence notice
validation_rules.check: If qualifier_class = Q-04 or any EvidenceBlock.grounding_status = Q-04: suppressed content must render an explicit absence notice, not a blank section or silent omission
validation_rules.fail_message: Q-04 suppression rendered silently — explicit absence notice is mandatory — governance violation
validation_rules.enforcement: Absence notice text: 'Signal intelligence withheld from this view'. Section is visibly marked absent.

validation_rules.name: Phase 2 contains no live AI interaction
validation_rules.check: Phase 2 rendering: no text input fields connected to AI generation; no conversational AI response surfaces; no LLM response rendering at interaction time; all panel content sourced from committed report_object only
validation_rules.fail_message: Live AI interaction detected in Phase 2 — governance violation — Phase 5 gate required for conversational surfaces
validation_rules.enforcement: All explainability panel content pre-rendered at generation time. Expand/collapse is pure display state — no computation at interaction time.

validation_rules.name: topology objects are read-only display objects
validation_rules.check: No LENS interaction writes to topology_scope fields; no workspace action produces a topology update request; topology display object is generated from canonical_topology.json at report generation time — not at LENS render time
validation_rules.fail_message: Topology mutation attempted via LENS — governance violation — TP-BRIDGE-01..05 violated
validation_rules.enforcement: TopologyDisplayObject is part of the committed report_object. LENS cannot request topology updates. canonical_topology.json is READ-ONLY to all LENS layers.

validation_rules.name: same report_object must render deterministically
validation_rules.check: Given identical report_object input: rendering produces identical ExecutiveIntelligenceModule output on every invocation
validation_rules.fail_message: Non-deterministic rendering detected — governance violation — same report_object must always produce same rendered output
validation_rules.enforcement: Rendering adapters are pure transformation functions. No random state, no time-varying behavior, no AI generation at render time.

BLOCKED: ROM-VAL-05: governance_verdict absent, invalid, or FAIL
ROM-VAL-12: explainability_bundle missing any of 7 panels
ROM-VAL-16: GEIOS internals detected in executive surface
DIAGNOSTIC: ROM-VAL-15: rendering_metadata incomplete or normalization_version absent
GOVERNANCE_VIOLATION: ROM-VAL-18: live AI interaction in Phase 2
WARN_AND_DEACTIVATE: ROM-VAL-14: phase-restricted interaction active before gate

qualifier_preservation_checks.QP-01: qualifier_class is present and non-null in all rendering contexts
qualifier_preservation_checks.QP-02: qualifier_class may not be upgraded — Q-01 renders as Q-01; never renders as Q-00
qualifier_preservation_checks.QP-03: qualifier chip is mandatory for Q-01, Q-02, Q-03 — never hidden for aesthetic reasons
qualifier_preservation_checks.QP-04: Q-04 renders explicit absence notice — never a blank section
qualifier_preservation_checks.QP-05: All active qualifiers enumerated in QUALIFIERS explainability panel
qualifier_preservation_checks.QP-06: Qualifier tooltip content sourced from Q-taxonomy definition — LENS cannot override

topology_read_only_checks.TP-02: topology_scope fields are display metadata — no signal derivation from these values
topology_read_only_checks.TP-03: No workspace interaction produces a topology update request
topology_read_only_checks.TP-04: TopologyDisplayObject (Phase 3+) uses aliases only — no raw topology keys
topology_read_only_checks.TP-05: Topology edge representation never exposes edge weights or topology metrics

audience_visibility_checks.EXECUTIVE: Sees: narrative, evidence summaries, signal cards, qualifier chips, readiness badge, propagation summary, WHY/EVIDENCE/QUALIFIERS/CONFIDENCE/READINESS_STATE panels. Does not see by default: TRACE collapsed, LINEAGE hidden, derivation_hash hidden.
audience_visibility_checks.ADVISORY: Sees all EXECUTIVE content plus: TRACE expanded, LINEAGE panel, full propagation path, evidence_object_hash as reference ID.
audience_visibility_checks.AUDIT: Sees all ADVISORY content plus: full trace_linkage, evidence_object_hash full, derivation_hash as reference ID, stream and run identifiers.
